rows.question: What is document/file 'Student CSV/XLSX Template' used for?
rows.answer: Columns: student_name, grade, section, school_roll_number, consent_obtained; examples included.
rows.build_instruction: Represent document student_csv_template in files/documents spec with mode=generated, formats=csv,xlsx.
rows.test_instruction: Verify student_csv_template appears in file/document registry.

rows.question: Who uploads or generates 'Student CSV/XLSX Template'?
rows.build_instruction: Implement upload/generation permission for student_csv_template.
rows.test_instruction: Permission test verifies only school_coordinator can create student_csv_template.

rows.question: What formats are allowed for 'Student CSV/XLSX Template'?
rows.build_instruction: Validate allowed file formats for student_csv_template: csv,xlsx.
rows.test_instruction: Reject unsupported file format for student_csv_template.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'Student CSV/XLSX Template'?
rows.build_instruction: Apply file access policy for student_csv_template: public_or_school_specific; Template download available only when participation approved; school-specific download logged if personalised.
rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies student_csv_template cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'Student CSV/XLSX Template'?
rows.answer: Template download available only when participation approved; school-specific download logged if personalised.
rows.build_instruction: Implement lifecycle/control rule for student_csv_template: Template download available only when participation approved; school-specific download logged if personalised.
rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for student_csv_template.

rows.question: What is document/file 'Student Upload File' used for?

rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies student_upload_file cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What visibility/security applies to 'Parent Consent Declaration'?

rows.test_instruction: File access test verifies parent_consent_declaration cannot be accessed by unauthorised users.

rows.question: What lifecycle/control rule applies to 'Parent Consent Declaration'?
rows.answer: Required before finalising student count; private and retained by policy.
rows.build_instruction: Implement lifecycle/control rule for parent_consent_declaration: Required before finalising student count; private and retained by policy.
rows.test_instruction: Lifecycle test verifies gates/audit for parent_consent_declaration.
